contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper that searches for an existing scsi_target matching the given channel and id, and if found, increments its reference count via get_device on the embedded struct device. The caller receives a pointer to the scsi_target with an additional reference, and must release it with a corresponding put (e.g., put_device or scsi_target_put) when done. If no matching target is found, NULL is returned and no reference is taken. The function does not allocate or create a new target; it only acquires a reference on an existing one.
